title: coryphopteris oligolepia
intro: Coryphopteris oligolepia, also known as the Pteris fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Pteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Coryphopteris oligolepia include the relief of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves can be used to make tea or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
